narrative:
Van Buren Twp. township has 1,776 registered voters, with 57.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.7 percentage points.
